title: FunnyEnchantment
description:
More Enchantment Books

Currently available enchantments : Kindness, Walk on Lava, More Experience, Super Jump, Tetanus, and Vampirism.
（目前可用的魔法 仁慈、在熔岩上行走、更多经验、超级跳跃、破伤风和吸血鬼。）
body:
# More interesting enchantments  (更多有趣的附魔)

Kindness:Doesn't deal damage to entities but has a knockback effect further away from them
(仁慈：不会对实体造成伤害，但会在距离实体较远时产生击退效果)

Vampirism:Has a chance of restoring the enchanted level of blood when dealing damage to an entity
(吸血鬼：对实体造成伤害时，有几率恢复血量)

Walking on Magma: You can walk on the magma of the next session, generating hellstone cubes underneath your feet.
(在岩浆上行走：你可以在下界的岩浆上行走，脚下会产生地狱石方块。)

More experience: easy to fight monsters and upgrade to get more experience to enchant your own equipment
(更多经验：轻松打怪升级，获得更多经验)

Super Jump: can jump higher depending on current enchantment level
(超级跳跃：根据当前附魔等级可跳得更高)

Tetanus: Adds a new Bleeding effect, which has a certain probability of hitting the player when attacking them. Bleeds the player until they die.
(破伤风: 添加新的流血效果，该效果在攻击玩家时有一定概率命中玩家。使玩家流血直至死亡。)
